name: LDA
description: Latent Dirichlet Allocation (LDA) is a topic modeling algorithm that discovers latent topics in a corpus of documents represented as term-frequency vectors.
input: It takes in a DataFrame as input and performs LDA
output: LDA Model is passed to the next Node for Prediction or Storing

fields.name: featuresCol
fields.title: Features Column
fields.description: Vector column representing documents, where each entry corresponds to the term count for a word in the vocabulary.

fields.name: k
fields.title: K
fields.description: Number of latent topics to be inferred from the corpus.

fields.name: maxIter
fields.title: Max Iterations
fields.description: Maximum number of iterations for topic model training.

fields.name: optimizer
fields.title: Optimizer
fields.description: Inference algorithm used to estimate the LDA model. Online optimizer is scalable for large corpora, while EM provides exact inference for smaller datasets.

fields.name: topicDistributionCol
fields.title: TopicDistributionColumn
fields.description: Output column containing the topic probability distribution for each document.

fields.name: docConcentration
fields.title: Doc Concentration
fields.description: Dirichlet prior for document-topic distributions. Smaller values encourage sparse topic assignments per document.

fields.name: checkpointInterval
fields.title: checkpointInterval
fields.description: Number of iterations between checkpoints. Use -1 to disable checkpointing.

fields.name: subsamplingRate
fields.title: subsamplingRate
fields.description: Fraction of the corpus sampled in each iteration for online optimization. Value must be in the range (0, 1].

fields.name: seed
fields.title: Seed
fields.description: Random seed for reproducible topic modeling results.

fields.name: maxTermsPerTopic
fields.title: MaxTermsPerTopic
fields.description: Number of top-ranked terms to display or retain per topic.

fields.name: keepLastCheckpoint
fields.title: Keep Last Checkpoint
fields.description: Indicates whether the final checkpoint should be retained after training.

fields.name: optimizeDocConcentration
fields.title: Optimize Doc Concentration
fields.description: Specifies whether the document concentration parameter should be automatically optimized during training.
